public_inputs.name: prompt
public_inputs.value: Man on a small bycicle being chased by a police car. The sirens are blaring and the crowd of bystanders is cheering loudly. As he is pedaling away on the bike, he looks back at the police car and shouts in a taunting tone: "you can't catch me!" and waving his fist in the air. He then pedals away on his bike.

public_inputs.name: prompt
public_inputs.value:
Apocalyptic landscape with abandoned buildings, overgrown with foliage and trees. The sky is clear and the sun is setting, with the horizon turning bright red. The buildings are delapidated, falling apart and crumbling due to being abandoned for so long.
The air is full of silence and the only thing to be heard is a young girl breathing and saying: "Where is everyone?"

public_inputs.name: prompt
public_inputs.value: A traditional Japanese tea ceremony takes place in a tatami room as a host carefully prepares matcha. Soft traditional koto music plays in the background, adding to the serene atmosphere. The bamboo whisk taps rhythmically against the ceramic bowl while water simmers in an iron kettle. Guests kneel in formal seiza position, watching in respectful silence. The host bows and presents the tea bowl, turning it precisely before offering it to the first guest with soft-spoken words.
